name: West Africa Energy Corridor
macro_gravity_summary: Power demand rises while grid reliability lags. Capital and governance must align to close the gap.

name: MENA Cross-Border Infrastructure Activation Program
macro_gravity_summary: A structured activation platform designed to convert regional pressure into deployable cross-border infrastructure. Focused on digital sovereignty, distributed energy resilience, and corridor integration. Built to align with Public Investment Fund mandate priorities by accelerating projects from concept to FID with clear governance, defined capital pathways, and early risk allocation.

name: Nigeria Financial & Energy Circulation Spine
macro_gravity_summary: A licensed, revenue-generating microfinance banking and financial circulation system embedded in Nigeria, integrating: regulated banking core, wallet and payment rails, 2000+ fuel station QR redemption nodes, enterprise allocation controls, and a governance control plane.
structural_role: UDG executes. USG architects scale, governance alignment, and regional expansion sequencing.

name: Hyperscaler-Aligned AI Infrastructure Platform (Andhra Pradesh)
macro_gravity_summary: Government land/power enablement plus L&T execution and Nvidia anchoring create high-pressure pre-FID conditions for a gigawatt-scale AI campus, with unresolved sponsor governance and capital-stack sequencing as the primary bottleneck.
structural_role: USG designs commitment architecture pre-FID: governance, capital sequencing, risk allocation, and bankability package.
fid_event_definition: Capital close + tenancy/offtake commitments + governance package ratification + EPC NTP + power/land enforceable terms

name: Gulf–Africa Trade Corridor Platform
macro_gravity_summary: The stabilization of Dangote refinery and other African supply nodes creates a window to architect a Gulf–Africa trade corridor. A UAE-based platform can aggregate Gulf demand, coordinate logistics, and route refined products and other commodities from African supply anchors to global markets.
structural_role: USG designs phase-gated commitment architecture: domestic-priority compatibility now, export-valve activation criteria next, and global distribution scale once allocation thresholds are met.
fid_event_definition: Formal corridor SPV/JV execution triggered by sustained export allocation, anchored sponsor commitments, approved trade-finance lines, and contracted multi-year offtake under UAE operating structure.
phase_label: Phase-2 export corridor once African supply nodes reach stable export allocation.
